data.title: Pacific National Funding partners with Beachfront for debt consolidation & credit monitoring. Enhances lender ecosystem. Sioux Falls, SD.
data.description: Pacific National Funding (PNF) based in Sioux Falls, S.D., solidifies its position as a national frontrunner in consumer financial services through a recent collaboration with Beachfront. This partnership provides PNF access to Beachfront's comprehensive lender network, expansive marketing capabilities, and innovative financial wellness resources. The move, announced on Sept. 24, 2025, establishes PNF as a prominent player in the industry, enabling enhanced consumer options and outcomes.

data.title: BizzyCar secures $20M in funding, totaling $50M, to enhance AI-powered recall platform for dealerships.
data.description: ST. PETERS, Mo., Sept. 24, 2025 - BizzyCar, a prominent company offering AI-driven recall management solutions for dealerships, recently secured an additional $20 million in funding in a follow-on to its Series B round. With this latest funding, their total raised capital now reaches $50 million. The company is leveraging these funds to expand its AI-powered recall and mobile service platform to provide advanced solutions.

data.title: Dresner Advisory Services reveals 2025 Industry Excellence Award winners in Wisdom of Crowds Research.
data.description: Dresner Advisory Services announced the winners of its 2025 Industry Excellence Awards on September 24, 2025, in Nashua, New Hampshire. The awards recognized vendors who excelled in the company's 2025 Wisdom of Crowds® Business research. This annual honor highlights industry leaders and innovators, showcasing their contributions to the business landscape. This year's honorees demonstrate exceptional performance and leadership, setting benchmarks for others in the industry.
Russia sees 2026 gas output at 690.4 bcm - IFX.
Russia sees 2026 oil exports at 241.7m tons - IFX.
Russia cuts 2025 lng export forecast to 35.7m tons - IFX.
Russian Government raises Russian oil exports forecast for 2025 by 4.5% to 240.1 million tons and by 1.6% to 241.7 million tons in 2026 - Economy Ministry's Document.

data.title: PEPSI® National Battle of the Bands expands to The Palm Beaches during MLK Weekend 2026 with inaugural event at Florida Atlantic University Stadium.
data.description: A highly anticipated event, the Pepsi National Battle of the Bands (NBOTB) will be debuting its first South Florida edition from January 16 to 18, 2026, at the Florida Atlantic University Stadium in THE PALM BEACHES, Fla. This showcase features renowned HBCU marching bands and promises an exciting display of talent. Mark your calendars for this historic event set to take place, as announced on September 24, 2025.

data.title: Shaklee acquires Modere assets in NZ, including Liquid Biocell Collagen & Natural Mineral Drink - expanding global presence.
data.description: In Miami on September 24, 2025, Shaklee, a prominent player in the nutrition and wellness sector, revealed its latest move in the international market. The company has solidified its global footprint by acquiring specific assets from Modere in New Zealand through a wholly owned subsidiary. This strategic acquisition highlights Shaklee's commitment to growth and market expansion.

data.title: Firehawk Aerospace receives over $60 million in investment, gains European investor, strengthens defense supply chain.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Prague, Firehawk Aerospace, a key player in defense technology focusing on advanced energetics and propulsion, announced a notable investment from Presto Tech Horizons (PTH), a distinctive defense and resilience tech fund established through a collaboration between undisclosed entities.

data.title: Cintas Corp's fiscal Q1 2026 revenue hits $2.72B, up 8.7% from last year; $2.50B. Organic growth supported increase.
data.description: In Cincinnati, Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) released its fiscal 2026 first-quarter results ending on August 31, 2025. The revenue for this quarter totaled $2.72 billion, marking an 8.7% rise from the previous year's $2.50 billion in the same period. Acquisitions contributed 0.9% to this growth. The organic revenue growth rate for the quarter, which excludes the effects of acquisitions and foreign exchange, stood at approximately [insert percentage].

data.title: EMCOR Group to sell EMCOR UK to OCS Group UK Limited for $255 million, accelerating business transformation.
data.description: Norwalk, Connecticut - EMCOR Group, Inc. disclosed that it has finalized a deal to sell EMCOR Group (UK) plc to OCS Group UK Limited for a total enterprise value of around £190 million, approximately $255 million in USD. EMCOR is shedding its UK building services segment in this agreement. OCS, an international facilities services company based in the UK, has acquired the segment. This move by EMCOR signifies a strategic shift in their operations.

data.title: RockDove Solutions & CPPS join to launch software-enabled workplace violence prevention solution at GSX. US businesses suffer $55.86 billion cost.
data.description: In a groundbreaking collaboration, a partnership has introduced the inaugural 'software-enabled workplace violence prevention and intervention' initiative. As of September 24, 2025, reports indicate that workplace violence has inflicted significant financial damages amounting to around $55.86 billion on businesses in the United States, alongside negatively impacting employee welfare. This new program aims to tackle this issue head-on...

data.title: Chad Tyler appointed Boys' Athletic Director at Sacred Heart Preparatory, known for organizational leadership, joined in 2023.
data.description: In Atherton, California on September 24, 2025, Sacred Heart Preparatory (SHP) revealed the selection of Chad Tyler as the Boys' Athletic Director. Tyler, a member of the SHP athletic team since 2023, possesses expertise in organizational leadership, operations, and student management.

data.title: Tractor Beverage Co. supports family farmers at Farm Aid 40, showcasing organic drinks. DENVER, Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Denver on September 24, 2025, Tractor Beverage Company, which is a farmer-founded and employee-owned producer of certified organic craft beverages, marked a significant sponsorship milestone. They have proudly supported Farm for two years now. This sponsorship highlights their commitment to organic advocacy, soil stewardship, and their recently sold-out product, Haymaker.

data.title: Microsoft healthcare exec Kim Swafford joins RAAPID advisory board. Company backed by M12 appoints her.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky on September 24, 2025, RAAPID, a company supported by M12 (Microsoft Venture Fund) and a prominent provider of AI-driven risk adjustment solutions, revealed the addition of Kim Swafford to its advisory board. Swafford, an Industry Executive at Microsoft Healthcare, joins the team to contribute her expertise.

data.title: IQT research report ranks IBM, Quantinuum, IonQ, and Rigetti as top in quantum computing industry. 12 firms profiled.
data.description: A recent report titled "Quantum Computer Markets: Who Leads?" delves into the competitive landscape of the quantum computing industry. The report features profiles on 12 key companies endeavoring to deliver full-stack quantum computers and advanced Quantum Processing Units (QPUs). These firms are assessed and compared based on a new rating system designed to gauge their positioning within the market. The report offers insights into the strategies and advancements of these companies vying for prominence in the quantum computing sector.

data.title: UnionPay International and Bank of China Frankfurt Branch introduce SplendorPlus Debit Card in Germany, first issuance in Europe.
data.description: In Frankfurt, Germany on September 24, 2025, UnionPay International (UPI) and Bank of China Frankfurt Branch introduced the SplendorPlus Debit Card, the company's inaugural issuance in Europe. The card is designed to cater to German residents traveling to China.

data.title: NYSE provides pre-market update; Health partners with NBA's Charlotte Hornets; Proofpoint unveils Satori. Ashley reports.
data.description: New York, September 24, 2025 - The daily pre-market update from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) offers timely market insights from the NYSE Trading Floor. Stay informed with today's NYSE Pre-market update for a head start before trading commences. Ashley Mastronardi presents the pre-market update featuring key information directly sourced from the NYSE Trading Floor.
Italy Plans To Issue About €14 Billion To €24 Billion In Government Bonds From October To December
